Create file governance/validators/validate_ssot_canonical_paths.py with content #!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
from pathlib import Path

CANONICAL = Path("governance/registries/SSOT_CANONICAL_PATHS.json")

def main() -> int:
    data = json.loads(CANONICAL.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    paths = data.get("canonical_paths", {})
    missing = [p for p in paths.values() if not Path(p).exists()]
    if missing:
        raise SystemExit("missing canonical paths: " + ", ".join(missing))
    print(json.dumps({"status":"ok","canonical_count":len(paths),"release_pass":False}, ensure_ascii=False))
    return 0

if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
